title: EvaMoichandising THE GAME
wikitext:
[]: EvaMoichandising "THE GAME"             Quote Post by EvaCub » Sat Mar 22, 2008 6:27 pm Got a good idea So first off welcome to the Eva Moichandising game! The point of this game is essentially to help the wiki with the Evangelion merchandise list So basically the idea/rules are this *Post as much Evangelion merchandise as you can *Post the name of the object *DO NOT repeat merchandise already listed *list details underneath the name of the object if necessary Sample post Evangelion Screwdriver Kaworu embroidered screwdriver EvaUnit02 rebuild revolvotech actionfigure *When listing models be sure to include series and company Anyways have fun and remeber children this is for the Wiki!

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Sat Mar 22, 2008 7:42 pm First Child plugsuit themed t-shirt Second Child plugsuit themed t-shirt (probably a Third Child plugsuit themed t-shirt as well)

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Mar 22, 2008 7:48 pm Here are some of the more outlandish ones: Ninja figures (believe it) Chinese police figures Kanned Koffee Rapey-Time Asuka The last two are still available on the official site, but currently sold out (for obvious reasons).

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Mar 22, 2008 7:56 pm I knew it was only a matter of time before some pr0n made it here.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Mar 22, 2008 8:07 pm You're missing the lighters and lighter covers, the mobile phone covers, the vending machine build-your-own evas, the papercrafts, the wrist and head bands, the stickers, the plastic cups, the iron-ons, the key-chains, the towels and washcloths, the beddings, etc. On top of the stuff you can normally buy outside of Japan like the books, shirts, posters and figures. There's no possible way all of this stuff can be listed in the wiki. The stuff I listed above is just stuff you can buy at one Animate. And actually, I have an Eva-01 papercraft that was a free gift from the Tokyo Anime Center, but I'll probably never put it together.

[]:             Quote Post by Enki v.2 » Sat Mar 22, 2008 11:28 pm [img]http://www.angolz.com/usercontrols/images/img.aspx?sp=/Files/Images/Products/tak67200_z.jpg&w=280&ro=1 [/img] Er... I guess that last one isn't really merch, but... **SO** worth it!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Mar 22, 2008 11:31 pm Pictures are well and good -- but everyone has pictures. The challenge is actually knowing what the pictures "refer to". Like, "This is Bandai Platinum Limited Edition Rei & Asuka Lesbian Plamodel V5.0 ".

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Sun Mar 23, 2008 12:03 am Enki, you realize when you get old, Rei's gonna get saggy and have liver spots all over......

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Mar 23, 2008 1:16 am Reichu wrote: Bandai Platinum Limited Edition Rei & Asuka Lesbian Plamodel V5.0

[]:             Quote Post by Enki v.2 » Sun Mar 23, 2008 10:44 am Reichu, you have reason; I don't have the cash to buy any of those things, though, so I never really bothered to find the names. (Most of the pics have the name and other info on them, but my .jp is shoddy).

[]:             Quote Post by RandomStuff » Sun Mar 23, 2008 9:41 pm The Rei w/ maid suit/sword looks like that chick from Ikki Tousen

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sun Mar 23, 2008 9:58 pm RandomStuff wrote: The Rei w/ maid suit/sword looks like that chick from Ikki Tousen

[]:             Quote Post by birdyofthemoongoddess » Sun Mar 23, 2008 10:12 pm I KNEW IT! ooooooooooooooo me so good with recognizing hot chicks in crappy pantyshot anime!

Article: EvaMoichandising THE GAME
[]: EvaMoichandising "THE GAME"             Quote Post by EvaCub » Sat Mar 22, 2008 6:27 pm Got a good idea So first off welcome to the Eva Moichandising game! The point of this game is essentially to help the wiki with the Evangelion merchandise list So basically the idea/rules are this *Post as much Evangelion merchandise as you can *Post the name of the object *DO NOT repeat merchandise already listed *list details underneath the name of the object if necessary Sample post Evangelion Screwdriver Kaworu embroidered screwdriver EvaUnit02 rebuild revolvotech actionfigure *When listing models be sure to include series and company Anyways have fun and remeber children this is for the Wiki!

There's no possible way all of this stuff can be listed in the wiki. The stuff I listed above is just stuff you can buy at one Animate. And actually, I have an Eva-01 papercraft that was a free gift from the Tokyo Anime Center, but I'll probably never put it together.
